company_name: Douzone Bizon EQT cloud ERP case
notes: EQT deal is useful evidence for B2B SaaS/ERP quality, but ARR, churn, OPM, and FCF still gate Green.

company_name: Palantir Q4 2025 AI revenue and contract value
notes: AI is treated as structural only because revenue, contract value, and Rule of 40 evidence are present.

company_name: Palantir Q1 2026 fastest growth but 4B watch
notes: Strong revenue can still be 4B-watch when multiple expansion is saturated.

company_name: Netflix ad tier reaches 70 million users
notes: Ad-tier users and signup mix support Stage 2, but ad revenue, ARPU, churn, and privacy gate Green.

company_name: Netflix ad tier 250m and privacy watch
notes: Netflix ad tier can be structural, but privacy/data litigation keeps RedTeam active.

company_name: The Trade Desk premium valuation revenue miss
notes: Ad-tech can be structural, but premium valuation makes revenue or guide misses a 4C watch.

company_name: The Trade Desk weak Q2 guide
notes: Good revenue is not enough when forward guidance weakens under a premium multiple.
Security ARR does not protect Stage 3 if operational trust breaks.
Customer damage and litigation convert an outage from a technical issue into hard RedTeam evidence.

company_name: Kakao founder legal overhang and acquittal
notes: Platform moat is not enough while founder/M&A legal overhang pressures the valuation frame.

company_name: Roblox safety measures and forecast cut
notes: UGC game platforms cannot be scored on user scale alone when safety controls cut bookings.
Large IP is not automatic Green; delay risk can move price before bookings arrive.
Ad recovery is cyclical unless budget resilience and structural ad-tech economics are proven.

company_name: WPP profit drop and AI disruption
notes: Traditional agencies need a strong cap because AI disruption can attack the margin pool.
Ad revenue must pass a quality filter; scam-ad allegations are RedTeam evidence.
Large-platform growth must be discounted when youth safety remedies can change product mechanics.
